property.description: IP Fragment Overlap: Difference in offsets should be less than fragment length (evasion attempt).

event.description: IP Fragment with Same Identification and Differences in Offsets Less than Length
event.boolean_expression: (ip.identification == ip.identification.1) and ((ip.frag_offset > ip.frag_offset.1) and ((ip.frag_offset - ip.frag_offset.1) < ip.tot_len))
